title: Join the SC2 Community Discord
body: Connect with other players, find matches, and stay up to date with the latest news and tournaments.

title: SC2 Mod Manager v1.0.0
body: Initial release. Download maps, manage your gamedata, and back up your mod presets.

title: SC2 Mod Manager v1.4.0
body:
Latest Release: Version 1.4.0

New Features:
- Added the News Feed for community news, tournament announcements, update information, and more
- Added the Map Preview for downloadable and installed maps
- Added Terms of Use and an installation wizard
- Allows users to change the game path to a valid location and choose where internal Mod Manager files are stored
- Allows users to create and delete mod presets in Backups
- Now includes a button to uninstall the Mod Manager
- Various bugs have been fixed

title: SC2 Mod Manager v1.5.0
body:
Latest Release: Version 1.5.0

New Features:
- Added four faction-based color themes (Jaywix Standard, UEF, Cybran Nation, and Aeon Illuminate) that can be selected in Settings and apply instantly across the entire application including buttons, borders, list selections, and text
- Added faction-themed background images for both the main content area and sidebar that change to match the selected theme
- Added sorting to all mod and map lists by name (A-Z / Z-A) or release date (newest / oldest), with unknown dates treated as the oldest
- Changed mod and map naming conventions to include version numbers and author names directly in the file name

title: SC2 Mod Manager v1.6.1
body:
Latest Release: Version 1.6.1

New Features:
- Added new navigation from installed mods pages to download mod pages and vice versa
- Added metadata information for generic mods
- Fixed bug with not recognizing unknown files if they existed in gamedata when the mod manager was installed
- News items can be collapsed
- Added instruction on the home page
- Now appends SC2ModManager to the user specified directory for install
- Added quick folder finders in the settings page

title: 2026 Summer Open 1v1 Tournament
body:
Open to players of all skill levels! Share and invite your friends to participate in the biggest Supreme Commander 2 tournament of 2026 with a prize pool of $1000+!

To register, follow these simple steps:
1. Join the discord linked below
2. Sign up in the 'registrations' channel
3. Carefully read the rules in the 'rules' channel
4. Message 'general' with any questions

Tournament will be held on Saturday, June 20th at 4:00 PM UTC + 0
